blocker_summary: REGRESSION-20260619-20 proved CAND-20260618-08 no longer has the previous premature web/search or install-sim approval bug.
The remaining E35 failure is over-conservatism: after no-decision on proposed agents, the run stopped before displayed-scope main-agent implementation and formal-entry verification.
CAND-20260619-09 is a minimal wording candidate to remove that extra implementation approval requirement while preserving action-specific web and install approvals.
